content.rendered:
Our Team

The Force Behind Forecast Immigration

CEO & MANAGING PARTNER

Taha Bin Mujahid

Read more

Mr. Taha Bin Mujahid, the brain behind Forecast Immigration is dedicated to create an impact in immigration industry with a handful experience of 10+ years in the field. Completed his MBA in Marketing Management & Entrepreneurship from a Prestigious Dual Degree Program, He’s eager to empower the immigration business with his extraordinary leadership skills and business understanding.

His extensive professional experience in GCC Region and Pakistan help him stand out. Taha’s unique approach toward citizenship and residency programs, his expertise in legal matters and documentation and his problem-solving vision to make global citizenship accessible for all, the reasons why Forecast Immigration is a name of credibility and one stop solution if you are planning to relocate. From UK Self Sponsor Program to Portugal Golden Visa, UAE Residency, Caribbean Citizenship, USA Business Immigration and Other European Residency Schemes, Forecast got you covered

Facebook Instagram Linkedin
CEO & Managing Partner

Asif Waheed

Read more

Mr. Asif Waheed, CEO & Managing Partner of Forecast Immigration is a maestro in his field. With 12+ years of experience in the Immigration Industry, he has worked in the GCC Region and Pakistan side by side. His understanding and knowledge of the industry will put you in awe. Asif got answers to all your queries related to Citizenship or Residency by Investment, Documentation, Due Diligence, Global Real Estate Investment, and all the Legal Matters involved in the process.

After completing his Master’s degree in Finance and Entrepreneurship from a reputed international university, he landed in the immigration world. He is eager to establish bigger horizons for investors, businessmen, and professionals looking for an upgrade in life.
An absolute genius in academics and later in professional life, Forecast Immigration is brainchild of Mr. Asif Waheed. From European Residency Options leading to Nationality, Golden Visas, Caribbean Second Passport Schemes, and Business Immigration in the UK, USA, and Canada, He will help you get it all sorted.
